Darrius Shepherd 23 Yd pass from Easton Stick (Cam Pedersen Kick)

videos.headline: Holloway eludes defense for 47-yard TD
videos.description: Charleston Southern's Mike Holloway drives down the sideline and cuts across the field for a 47-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF ONE-PLAY (Holloway alludes defense for 47-yard TD) 2016/08/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Shepherd beats defender for TD
videos.description: Darrius Shepherd beats the defender to the corner of the end zone, receives the pass and scores a 23-yard touchdown to tie the game at 10 for North Dakota State.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF ONE-PLAY (Shepherd beats defender for TD) 2016/08/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Urzindowski goes deep down field for TD
videos.description: Easton Stick makes the long pass to RJ Urzindowski for the 47-yard touchdown, putting the Bison ahead 17-10.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF ONE-PLAY (Urzindowski goes deep down field for TD) 2016/08/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Frazier's TD in overtime is the game winner
videos.description: With 4th down and 10 in over time, King Frazier made the run for a 25-yard TD, marking the first overtime win for the North Dakota State Bison.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF ONE-PLAY (North Dakota State scores on first play of OT) 2016/08/27 ESHEET
